meta.topic: The real cost of ₹999 Pvt Ltd incorporation — what nobody quotes

slides.headline: ₹999 Pvt Ltd incorporation. Here's the full bill nobody quotes.

slides.subhead: What a ₹999 incorporation realistically costs after government fees, DSC, stamp duty, and the 'strongly recommended' add-ons.

slides.headline: The advertised price vs. the actual invoice

left.label: The ₹999 promise
left.body: Pvt Ltd registration: ₹999. No hidden charges. Fast and simple.

right.label: The actual line items
right.body:
DSC (Class 3): ₹1,200–1,500
DIN (per director): ₹500
Name reservation: ₹1,000
MCA govt fee: ₹2,000–6,000 (state-dependent)
Stamp duty: ₹1,000–10,000 (state-dependent)
PAN + TAN: ₹200

slides.headline: The pattern that drives the real price up

left.label: What most services do
left.body: Quote the agent fee only (₹999). Government fees, DSC, and stamp duty are 'extra.' Upsell Startup India registration, trademark filing, and 'compliance packages' after you've started.

right.label: What Envesty does
right.body: Quote the full number upfront — agent fee + all govt fees + stamp duty estimate for your state. What we quote is what you pay. No calls pushing add-ons.

slides.headline: We publish the full number before you sign. If it ends up more than we quoted, we absorb the difference.

caption:
₹999 Pvt Ltd incorporation.

Here's the full bill nobody quotes.

The ₹999 is the agent's fee. It covers their paperwork. It does not cover:

→ DSC (Class 3 digital signature): ₹1,200–1,500 per director
→ DIN (if your first directorship): ₹500
→ Name reservation (RUN form): ₹1,000
→ MCA government fees: ₹2,000–6,000 depending on authorized capital
→ Stamp duty: ₹1,000–10,000 depending on your state
→ PAN + TAN application: ₹200

Total before the upsell calls start: ₹8,000–22,000.

Then comes the 'strongly recommended' GST registration, trademark filing, and annual compliance package.

We're not the cheapest option. We quote the real number — all government fees, all charges, your state — before you decide.

If you'd rather know the full cost upfront: comment QUOTE. I'll DM you a line-item breakdown for your specific situation.

No sales call. No follow-up. Just the number.

#PvtLtd #CompanyRegistration #Transparency #IndiaStartup #Compliance #StartupIndia #Founder
